title: [Journey's End, Study]
description: Small and cozy, the intimate study is lined with shelves filled with various books and volumes.  A small basket of sticks rests next to a large stone fireplace adorned with a thick oak mantle.  Tucked into a corner is a mistwood writing desk, its surface cluttered with various inkwells, parchments, and quills with a matching mistwood chair placed in front.  A large dart board hangs over an oak dartboard rack, which sits caddy-corner to a small tiled bar covered with a varied selection of food and drink.

Beneath the vaulted ceiling, this lofty chamber feels open and spacious.  Sunlight floods the room through floor-to-ceiling windows that line the southern wall, where a large mahogany desk and a plush high-backed chair sit before them.  Stretching along the northern wall is a long metal workbench with a drawer-fitted equipment trolley parked nearby.  A large stone fireplace anchors the western wall, flanked by a mahogany sideboard offering provisions and an ironwood storage locker secured with a large padlock.
